gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/217)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/217)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الْجَزَرُ أَمَانٌ مِنَ الْقُولَنْجِ وَ الْبَوَاسِيرِ وَ يُعِينُ عَلَى الْجِمَاعِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Musa, from Ahmad Bin Al Hassan Al Jallab, from Musa Bin Ismail, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from one of our companions who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The carrots are a security from the colitis, and the hemorrhoids, and it aids upon the copulation’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn Musa from Ahmad ibn al-Hassan al-Jallab from Musa ibn ’Isma‘il from ibn abu ‘Umayr from certain persons of our people who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ’Carrot is protection against colic pain, hemorrhoid, and helps in going to bed with one’s wife.’”
